items.title: Otto agent showcase - this is the highest-leverage post left in May
items.rationale: Plan called for Otto showcase by May 8; today is week 8 (May 20) and it hasn't shipped. p003 proved engineer-grade content with named tools drives saves (612). Otto's workflow (Telegram -> N8N -> webinar link) is the same shape.
items.suggestedAction: draft p004 linkedin "Document post" pillar="Tools & demos" campaign="Agent ecosystem showcase" date=2026-05-22 hook="We replaced the webinar-creation Slack channel with a Telegram bot. Here's the actual workflow."

items.title: Launch the newsletter this week or lose the June target
items.rationale: Newsletter target for May was 60 subs; current is 0 because the inaugural issue hasn't shipped. June target is 140 - unhittable without 6+ weeks of compounding. Every week of delay halves the achievable Q2 number.
items.suggestedAction: draft newsletter "inaugural" date=2026-05-26 hook="What I shipped this month + 3 tools I stopped using"

items.title: Run a Claude Code vs OpenClaw post in the p001 format
items.rationale: p001 (named-tools format) cleared 312 saves vs the 80-save baseline. Learning l001 says German engineers save lists of named tools. Tool-comparison is the next natural beat.
items.suggestedAction: draft p005 linkedin "Long-form text" pillar=Education campaign="Workshop recap + clips" hook="Claude Code vs OpenClaw - I ran the same 3-hour project on both. Here's what broke."

items.title: Case studies pillar is at 0% delivered vs 25% target
items.rationale: We're 7 weeks past the workshop. Plan target is 25% Case studies (real shipped projects). Delivered: 0. Otto's webinar workflow + Camila's Drive automation are both ready - we just haven't written them up.
items.suggestedAction: draft p006 linkedin "Document post" pillar="Case studies" hook="Case: how we automated a client's monthly invoice ritual in 4 days. (No, it's not a CRM.)"

items.title: Recycle workshop clips - we have 4 hours of recording and 0 clipped posts
items.rationale: May theme is 'turn workshop into compounding artifacts'. Five weeks in, no clip has been published. The recording exists; the bottleneck is editing, not content.
items.suggestedAction: draft p007 linkedin "Video clips" pillar="Case studies" campaign="Workshop recap + clips" hook="From the workshop: the 90-second explanation of why N8N and Claude Code aren't competitors."
